name: claudient-everything
description: Meta-bundle listing all Claudient domain plugins (377+ skills, 104 agents). Install individual plugins: claudient-ai-engineering, claudient-automation, claudient-backend, claudient-data-ml, claudient-database, claudient-devops-infra, claudient-finance, claudient-finance-payments, claudient-git, claudient-gtm, claudient-legal, claudient-marketing, claudient-product, claudient-productivity, claudient-sdr, claudient-small-business. See README.md for install commands.
